subject: Payroll System Migration Plan
body:
HR and IT Teams,

We're migrating from ADP to Rippling. Timeline and key milestones:

Phase 1 - Setup (March 15-31):
- Configure Rippling tenant
- Import employee master data (312 employees)
- Set up payroll schedules (bi-weekly US, monthly EU)
- Configure benefits integrations

Phase 2 - Parallel Run (April 1-30):
- Run payroll in both systems
- Reconcile differences
- Test tax withholding accuracy
- Validate 401(k) contribution feeds

Phase 3 - Cutover (May 1):
- Disable ADP payroll processing
- Go live on Rippling
- Retain ADP access for historical records through December

Budget Impact:
- ADP annual cost: $156K
- Rippling annual cost: $98K (includes HRIS + payroll)
- Migration one-time cost: $25K
- Annual savings: $58K + consolidation of 3 HR tools

Please assign a point person from each team for the migration working group.
